methods.description: This method describes the process of dividing animals into groups and administering various treatments to study the effects of different substances over a period of 9 days.

steps.description: The animals were randomly divided into 5 groups (n=7).
The study period lasted for 9 days and different parameters were measured on the tenth day.
steps.searchable_summary: conduct study over 9 days and measure parameters on the tenth day

steps.description: The first group (control) did not receive any extract solvent, extract, or gentamicin during the study period.
steps.searchable_summary: assign control group with no treatment

steps.description: The second group (sham) received an intraperitoneal injection of extract solvent for 9 days and from the third day, normal saline was injected instead of gentamicin.
steps.searchable_summary: administer extract solvent and normal saline to sham group

steps.description: The third group was gentamicin, which received gentamicin at a dosage of 100mg/kg intraperitoneally from the third to the ninth day.
In this group, the extract solvent was injected from the beginning to the end of the treatment period.
steps.searchable_summary: inject extract solvent throughout treatment period

steps.description: The fourth (GM+DPP200) and the fifth (GM+DPP400) groups received an intraperitoneal injection of DPP extract for 9 consecutive days at dosages of 200 or 400mg/kg, respectively, and GM was injected from the third to the ninth day.
steps.searchable_summary: administer DPP extract and GM to fourth and fifth groups

steps.description: At the end of the study period, sodium pentobarbital (55mg/kg) was used to anesthetize the studied animals, followed by making an incision in the linea alba.
steps.searchable_summary: anesthetize animals and make incision for blood sampling

steps.description: A blood sample was then taken from the abdominal aorta and its plasma was isolated and stored at -72°C for hepatic enzymes measurements.
steps.searchable_summary: collect blood sample and isolate plasma for storage
